name: 108"x14" Woven Table Runner Olive - Threshold™
description:
Add warmth and character to everyday meals and casual gatherings with the Woven Table Runner from Threshold™. This rectangular table runner features a woven striped pattern in an olive hue that's complemented by fringed edges, adding a sophisticated touch you'll love. The 100% cotton table runner helps protect your surface against scratches and spills, and you can pair it with coordinating napkins and placemats to put together a stylish dining setup.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
